result:
I’d make it impossible for anyone to accumulate power at another’s involuntary expense. No coercion—financial, political, physical, psychological—could be amplified or hoarded by one person or group over another. The structures that feed on fear, scarcity, and manufactured division would collapse because the mechanism sustaining them would simply be missing from human systems.

The result wouldn’t be utopia—inventiveness, disagreement, ambition, even conflict would persist—but all of it would occur inside a boundary that prevents domination. People would still compete and cooperate, still succeed and fail, yet no triumph could be built on someone else’s broken will.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
